query:
SELECT p.name, p.value, p.capexGrade, p.priority, LEFT(p.overview, 150) as overview_start, m.matchScore
FROM collateralProjectMatches m 
JOIN projects p ON m.projectId = p.id
WHERE m.collateralId = 1 AND m.matchScore >= 80
ORDER BY p.value ASC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT p.name, p.value, p.capexGrade, p.priority, LEFT(p.overview, 150) as overview_start, m.matchScore
FROM collateralProjectMatches m 
JOIN projects p ON m.projectId = p.id
WHERE m.collateralId = 1 AND m.matchScore >= 80
ORDER BY p.value ASC
LIMIT 20;
